hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM-EM on multi-lab experimental LPTEM data with varying microscope conditions, sample chemistries, and electron beam parameters will reveal that transfer learning performance degrades non-uniformly across these variables, such that model robustness to liquid thickness variations does not guarantee robustness to changes in beam dose rate or particle material composition, requiring domain-specific adapter modules rather than full model fine-tuning for true cross-lab generalization.
